_note: Reconnects pre-existing orphaned fragments by adding MISSING but well-documented spine links (real people, real parent-child relationships). No invented people: connector spouses (Ermengarde of Hesbaya, Mary de Bohun, Catherine of Valois=CV, Gisela of Burgundy, etc.) and the parent-child links are all historical. Appends children onto existing unions where the parent-pair already exists. Ordered so any newly-created parent is defined before it is used as a parent.
